meaning: Chief of Naval Operations(美国)海军作战部长
examples: Make CNO sales report, payment collection report etc.
Use this CNO for the mount command to mount the read-only file system.
So the Woodman seized his axe, and with one stroke cut the Serpent in cno.
The Chief of Naval Operations, Admiral Vern Clark, has repeatedly expressed his strong support, as has virtually every former CNO.
